tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow. All students must arrive on time. This notice is for all employees. The office will be closed tomorrow. This notice is effective immediately.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Everyone should read this notice. A meeting will be held next Monday. Attendance of all members is compulsory. This notice has been put up on the board. Contact the office for any questions.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "यह सूचना विद्यार्थियों के हित में है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This notice is in the interest of the students.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "The office will be closed tomorrow yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The office will be closed tomorrow.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Please keep your documents ready. This notice was circulated throughout the campus. Visit the website for more information. Follow the above instructions.
